induction_input: The report the manager reviewed passed.
The cake the chef baked disappeared.
The letter the student wrote arrived.
The bridge the engineer designed collapsed.
The song the artist recorded played.
induced_prompt_raw: Write sentences using a double-noun-phrase structure where an object undergoes an action after being acted upon by someone.
induced_prompt: Write sentences using a double-noun-phrase structure where an object undergoes an action after being acted upon by someone.
l2_sentences: The chef seasoned the steak, the steak sizzling beautifully on the grill.
The painter brushed the canvas, the canvas absorbing every stroke of color.
The teacher corrected the essay, the essay emerging cleaner and more precise.
The mechanic tightened the bolt, the bolt holding the engine firmly in place.
The gardener watered the roses, the roses blooming brilliantly by the next morning.
